Title: OAuth 2.1 Provider: Unprivileged users can register OAuth clients
Description: An authorization bypass in the OAuth provider allows any authenticated low-privilege user to create OAuth clients even when the deployment configures clientPrivileges to restrict client creation. The option contract explicitly includes a create action, but the create paths never invoke that callback, so applications that rely on clientPrivileges for RBAC can be silently misconfigured into allowing unauthorized client registration.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 1.4.8-beta.7 before 1.6.5, all versions starting from 1.7.0-beta.0 up to 1.7.0-beta.1
NotImpacted: All versions before 1.4.8-beta.7, all versions starting from 1.6.5 before 1.7.0-beta.0, all versions after 1.7.0-beta.1
